verses.text: All Israel gathers as one man to Mizpeh. Gathered. The nation unites in outrage.
All Israel gathers as one man to Mizpeh. Gathered. The nation unites in outrage.
All Israel gathers as one man to Mizpeh. Gathered. The nation unites in outrage.
The Levite tells of the crime done at Gibeah. The charge. He recounts the wrong.
The Levite tells of the crime done at Gibeah. The charge. He recounts the wrong.
The Levite tells of the crime done at Gibeah. The charge. He recounts the wrong.
The Levite tells of the crime done at Gibeah. The charge. He recounts the wrong.
Israel resolves to punish Gibeah. Resolved. They will not let it pass.
Israel resolves to punish Gibeah. Resolved. They will not let it pass.
Israel resolves to punish Gibeah. Resolved. They will not let it pass.
Israel resolves to punish Gibeah. Resolved. They will not let it pass.
Benjamin refuses to give up the guilty men. Refused. The tribe shields its sin.
Benjamin refuses to give up the guilty men. Refused. The tribe shields its sin.
Both sides muster for war. War. Brother against brother.
Both sides muster for war. War. Brother against brother.
Both sides muster for war. War. Brother against brother.
Both sides muster for war. War. Brother against brother.
Israel inquires of God, but is smitten the first day. Smitten. Even the just suffer loss.
Israel inquires of God, but is smitten the first day. Smitten. Even the just suffer loss.
Israel inquires of God, but is smitten the first day. Smitten. Even the just suffer loss.
Israel inquires of God, but is smitten the first day. Smitten. Even the just suffer loss.
They weep, inquire again, and are smitten the second day. Again. Their resolve is tested.
They weep, inquire again, and are smitten the second day. Again. Their resolve is tested.
They weep, inquire again, and are smitten the second day. Again. Their resolve is tested.
They weep, inquire again, and are smitten the second day. Again. Their resolve is tested.
They fast and inquire; God promises victory. Promised. God answers the humbled.
They fast and inquire; God promises victory. Promised. God answers the humbled.
They fast and inquire; God promises victory. Promised. God answers the humbled.
They set an ambush behind Gibeah. Ambush. A stratagem is laid.
They set an ambush behind Gibeah. Ambush. A stratagem is laid.
They set an ambush behind Gibeah. Ambush. A stratagem is laid.
They set an ambush behind Gibeah. Ambush. A stratagem is laid.
The ambush takes the city as Benjamin pursues. Trapped. The tide turns.
The ambush takes the city as Benjamin pursues. Trapped. The tide turns.
The ambush takes the city as Benjamin pursues. Trapped. The tide turns.
The ambush takes the city as Benjamin pursues. Trapped. The tide turns.
Smoke rises; Benjamin sees the city burning. Smoke. The sign of doom.
Smoke rises; Benjamin sees the city burning. Smoke. The sign of doom.
Smoke rises; Benjamin sees the city burning. Smoke. The sign of doom.
Smoke rises; Benjamin sees the city burning. Smoke. The sign of doom.
Smoke rises; Benjamin sees the city burning. Smoke. The sign of doom.
Benjamin flees and is cut down. Routed. The guilty tribe falls.
Benjamin flees and is cut down. Routed. The guilty tribe falls.
Benjamin flees and is cut down. Routed. The guilty tribe falls.
All but six hundred are slain; their cities burned. Decimated. Sin nearly ends a tribe.
